deck_filename: Counter Taobao Weekly Update - Week ending 22 Aug.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian, Jianghong,

Please find the weekly Counter Taobao project update as of 22 August below.

Key Highlights


   -

   Overall:
   -

      Topline: ADO 87.6K (92% RR), MoM +32%, ADG $943K (93% RR), MoM +17%,
      behind target due to Lever 3 pause in mass pitching to onboard
sellers via
      ERP system.
      -

      SKU#: SKU# at 1.2M (19% RR) due to Lever 3.


   -

   Fashion:
   -

      Topline: ADO 47K (87% RR), ADG $461K (83% RR), ADO% to CB (excl CNLS)
      5.7% (MoM +0.6pp) mainly due to Lever 3 underperformance (RR 28%), we aim
      to catch up via 1-1 seller pitching, remaining levers are on track driven
      by MY/TH overperformance.
      -

      SKU#: SKU# at 858k (28% RR) due to Lever 3 challenges similar to
      topline underperformance.
      -

      Program PC2: 0.1%


   -

   Furniture:
   -

      Topline: ADO 7.5K (106% RR), ADG $273K (122% RR), ADO% (excl CNLS) to
      CB 1.3% (MoM +0.0pp) driven by program extension to CNLS particularly for
      MY given seller’s shift in focus from CB to CNLS following 3PF comms fee
      hike. MY top CNLS seller 中南 contribute 4.6K ADO (88% of CNLS Furniture
      Program sellers).
      -

      SKU#: SKU# at 279k (RR at 86%) due to Lever 3 underperformance,
      expected to catch up via 1-1 seller pitching.
      -

      Program PC2: 8.1%


   -

   F&B
   -

      Topline: ADO 1.7K (57% RR), ADG $12K (44% RR), ADO% to CB 2.5% (MoM
      +1pp). Low RR due to Lever 3 underperformance (RR at 4%) due to
slower than
      expected onboarding where only 3 of 14 onboarded sellers have completed
      listings, of which publish rate was at 36%. We have started a
trial test to
      unblock 3 subcategories in SG, successfully listing 6 SKUs on 15 Aug.
      -

         Next Step:To continue to monitor post-launch compliance risk
         before expanding to more SKUs.
         -

      SKU#: SKU#at 49K (2% RR), mainly due
